feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)

entry.title: Soul of Water
entry.summary:
Author: PaperFirefly

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 216,265Chapters: 26/29Kudos: 212

Summary: Buck made a friend as a child that would stay with him from that day on. That friend just so happened to be a spirited little water elemental. A promise has kept their bond a secret his entire life, but now that Buck is older, and a very perceptive Eddie Diaz has entered the picture, keeping his secret might not be as easy, or necessary, as he thought. Follow Buck as he learns more about his bond and abilities, all while dragging an unaware Eddie and Chris along for the ride.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: in the middle of things
entry.summary:
Author: sinnabonka

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,012Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Eddie realized dimly that his hand was still lifted, phone pressed to his ear, the call still live – Buck’s voice spilling through the speaker, thin and panicked and far too loud: “…Eddie, what is happening? Talk to me. Eddie.” He should have kissed him before leaving the house, Eddie thought, as his knees gave out. He should have kissed him more, period. Every chance he got. In the kitchen, from behind, hands wrapped around his waist. On the couch, during the quiet lull of a movie neither of them was watching. In the parking lot before a shift, just because he could. In the locker room as the bells went off – a good luck charm tucked just out of sight. He should have stopped acting like there’d always be another time.Or,  Eddie refuses to talk about his feelings until the universe literally shoots him about it.

entry.title: Weathering the storm
entry.summary:
Author: Never_x_Better

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,158Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 58

Summary: Post 09x14, Eddie tries to give Buck the space he wants, but quickly realises that's not what he actually needs, so he vows to do everything he can to help his best friend with his declining mental health. Or All the ways Eddie demonstrates his love for Buck without actually saying the L word (until he does), while Buck finally deals with everything he has been suppressing and crashes out.

entry.title: Finding Those Lost
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,450Chapters: 4/24Kudos: 180

Summary: Evangaline ‘Buck’ Buckley has made a home for herself in LA. After the long and difficult path to get here, she doesn’t think there is much left to surprise her. She has a new family, her son is thriving, and she’s loving her work as a firefighter. So what if sometimes the dark still comes for her some nights? When a new firefighter starts at the station, everything Buck thought she knew is thrown up in the air as she tries to keep her past and private life together. Things only get worse when dispatch starts messing the whole station around. -+- A season 2 rewrite that won't make much sense unless you've read part 1.

entry.title: My Life as Derek
entry.summary:
Author: nfarious

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,558Chapters: 19/19Kudos: 110

Summary: After surviving a traumatic kidnapping by Bonnie and Earl, who tried to force him into the role of their brain-dead son Derek, Evan "Buck" Buckley convinces himself the ordeal is behind him and skips therapy. On his way home from the station late at night, he is violently ambushed and abducted again—this time by an unseen captor wearing a grotesque Halloween mask. He awakens with a splitting headache inside an enormous, twisted adult-sized "nursery" painted in pastel blue, with giant block letters on the wall reading **DEREK’S NURSERY**. The room is a nightmarish blend of infantilizing comfort and dungeon-like control: oversized crib with steel bars, massive changing table with restraints, shelves of thick printed diapers, a playpen, and a huge rocking chair. Buck realizes his ordeal isn't over and that someone else wants him to be Derek. Question now is who and why?

entry.title: Eight Seconds Left In Overtime
entry.summary:
Author: aesthetic7766

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,495Chapters: 1/6Kudos: 7

Summary: “Why? Because you’re in love with me, or something?” Buck laughs, looking up from the sink expecting Eddie to do the same.“Would that be so crazy?” Eddie shoots back, repeating the same phrase his sister shot at him months prior, yet with a completely different kind of weight. “I mean, this thing between us,” He continues, gesturing between himself and Buck. “It’s never been just friendship has it?” Or, 5 times someone hints at Buck's feelings and 1 time he figures it out for himself.

entry.title: Working for the Knife
entry.summary:
Author: hisanatomy

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,501Chapters: 7/9Kudos: 320

Summary: "I want someone to tell me what to wear every morning. I want someone to tell me what to eat. What to like. What to hate. What to be mad about. What to listen to. What to buy tickets for. What to joke about. What not to joke about. I want someone to tell me what to believe in. Who to love and -how to tell them."His breath is ragged now. He can feel it, the way his body is trembling under the weight of his own words."I want someone to tell me how to live my life, Eddie, because so far, I think I've been getting it wrong."———————A twist on 8*06 “Confessions” ending scene. In which Eddie pushes, Buck gives in and they make decisions they can't come back from.Inspired by the confession scene from Fleabag, series two.Title: Working for the Knife by Mitski.

entry.title: Everything connects to Buck
entry.summary:
Author: Readitwatchitwriteit

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,733Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 14

Summary: Buck is Bobby's nephew and came to live with Bobby and Marcy at 12 years old after Danny and Mads moved out of the house. Someone called CPS and Evan was removed from the house to be raised by Bobby and Marcy. This is that story, Bobby Jr (RJ) and Brooke (B) survive the fire and live with their cousin Danny for a while well their dad and Buck become who they are. Chapter 1 is the story of Buck (Evan) growing up with Bobby, Marcy, Danny, and Kira (Danny's amazingly kickass girlfriend) caring for him. Maddie is still there as well, but more a s a background character in the first few chapters. Buck and Eddie will get together, but it's gonna be a few chapters before he's even introduced. I will try and follow most major plotlines, but it is told more in snap shots then flowing scenes. Please be aware of this! There is a mention of some Lonestar characters in here as well.

entry.title: the new mexico chainsaw massacre
entry.summary:
Author: tokyodates

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,643Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 55

Summary: “You don’t let anyone help you, ever! And right now—right now there’s a serial killer looking for us!!” “He’s not a serial killer—” “He has a fucking chainsaw!!!!” Buck says exasperatedly, shaking his arms at Eddie like he’s going insane himself. “That’s covered in blood and there’s a fucking dead body in the laundry room you have got to be kidding me!!” “Well if he’s a serial killer would you stop screaming so he can’t find us,” Eddie whisper-yells, going red in the face.or: if 9x13 actually went serial-killer

entry.title: seven billion people in the world and i found you
entry.summary:
Author: Gingerific

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,854Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 81

Summary: The drive home was quieter, Chris barely awake in the backseat and the window rolled down slightly. Buck hadn’t repeated what him and Chris talked about but had assured him that he was okay and it was nothing that Chris wouldn’t tell him on his own. There was no doubt when he said it, like it was a foregone conclusion that Chris would come around.Eddie let his thoughts wander as he drove the familiar route, the same route he had been driving for nearly three years. The house to the apartment, the apartment to the house; he could probably do it in his sleep. He thought about Ana, about how he liked her, how he could envision bringing her back to Texas to meet his parents and how they’d approve of her.But it didn’t warm him the way he thought it would, or should. Or: After picking Christopher up from Buck’s, Eddie can’t help but to wonder if he missed something in his Captain’s advice.

entry.summary:

Summary: Buck and Eddie have a particularly hard day and decide they both need a comfort that can only come from each other. Or buck and Eddie knowing exactly what the other needs

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: When the Savior Needs to Be Saved
entry.summary:
Author: ShinyRubyy

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,682Chapters: 4/9Kudos: 206

Summary: Buck didn’t think things could get worse for him after the lawsuit with him still on the outs with the team, not on speaking terms with his sister and still man behind the majority of the time. He didn’t think things could get worse… until they did. OR Buck is struggling after the lawsuit when he gets diagnosed with cancer.
